groundstation.missionprofile.ContactPost.Docs: Amount of time in seconds after a contact ends that you’d like to receive a CloudWatch Event indicating the pass has finished. For more information on CloudWatch Events, see the [What Is CloudWatch Events?](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/events/WhatIsCloudWatchEvents.html)

groundstation.missionprofile.ContactPreP.Docs: Amount of time in seconds prior to contact start that you'd like to receive a CloudWatch Event indicating an upcoming pass. For more information on CloudWatch Events, see the [What Is CloudWatch Events?](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/events/WhatIsCloudWatchEvents.html)

groundstation.missionprofile.DataflowEdg.Docs: A list containing lists of config ARNs. Each list of config ARNs is an edge, with a "from" config and a "to" config.

groundstation.missionprofile.MinimumViab.Docs: Minimum length of a contact in seconds that Ground Station will return when listing contacts. Ground Station will not return contacts shorter than this duration.

groundstation.missionprofile.Name.Docs: The name of the mission profile.

groundstation.missionprofile.Tags.Docs: Tags assigned to the mission profile.

groundstation.missionprofile.TrackingCon.Docs: The ARN of a tracking config objects that defines how to track the satellite through the sky during a contact.
